description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden filing cabinet with five drawers stacked vertically, each equipped with a metallic bar handle. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, elevating it slightly above the ground, and the drawers are partially open, revealing dark interiors. The wood has a deep, rich brown finish, giving the cabinet a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for both modern and traditional urban environments. The handles are silver or chrome, contrasting with the dark wood and providing a functional grip for opening the drawers. The top surface is flat and can be used to support small objects or documents. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the drawers, suggesting a simple, utilitarian design.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden filing cabinet with five drawers, each featuring metallic bar handles and standing on four slender legs. The cabinet has a classic, sturdy look with a flat top and no visible locks or label holders.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet and the five drawers partially open, with handles visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five drawers with metallic handles, emphasizing the vertical arrangement and accessibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the depth and open drawers from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, flat wooden back with no visible drawers or handles.
